source_jobs.title: Software Engineer
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT REPRALLY

RepRally is building the future of wholesale commerce. We’re a VC-backed technology startup in NYC, uniting brands, sales reps, and distributors into a single, powerful platform. Our mission: to make wholesale as connected, data-driven, and frictionless as consumer e-commerce.

We intentionally keep a low profile, but behind the scenes we’re scaling fast — powered by a tight-knit, elite team and backed by leading vertical investors including Infinity Ventures, Indicator Ventures, Mu Ventures, and Clocktower Ventures.





WHY THIS ROLE MATTERS

We’re looking for a senior, hands-on engineer who wants to own major product initiatives end-to-end. You’ll help architect and ship gamified features that drive lead generation, cart curation, and orders on our mobile-first platform. You’ll be building the backbone of a three-sided marketplace that’s transforming an industry — and you’ll do it in person with some of the sharpest operators in NYC.

What You’ll Do

 - Lead large initiatives from whiteboard to production, breaking down complex requirements into clear execution plans.

 - Architect and launch scalable, high-impact solutions for review flows, data provision, and platform integrations.

 - Collaborate directly with leadership to shape roadmap and technical direction.

 - Create engineering best practices for reviews, coding standards, and team insights.

 - Build efficient, reliable backend systems that can scale as our user base grows.

What We’re Looking For

 - 3–7+ years of engineering experience, ideally with startup or high-growth company exposure.

 - Proven ability to design and build large-scale systems.

 - Proficiency in backend server languages (Go, Ruby, Java, or Kotlin).

 - Experience with modern JavaScript/TypeScript frameworks.

 - Solid understanding of relational and NoSQL databases.

 - Strong technical leadership and collaborative skills — you know how to elevate the team around you.

 - Bachelor’s degree or equivalent experience.

Why You’ll Love Working Here

 - Impact from Day One: You’ll own projects that directly move the needle for the business.

 - Elite Team: Work alongside top-tier talent in engineering, product, and sales.

 - On-Site Energy: Collaborate in our Manhattan HQ — no Zoom fatigue, just fast decisions and faster builds.

 - Competitive Compensation + Equity: Every team member gets meaningful ownership.

 - Benefits that have your back:
   
   - 99% of medical, dental, and vision premiums covered.
   
   - Unlimited PTO (we mean it).

source_jobs.description:

RepRally is building the future of wholesale commerce. We’re a VC-backed technology startup in NYC, uniting brands, sales reps, and distributors into a single, powerful platform. Our mission: to make wholesale as connected, data-driven, and frictionless as consumer e-commerce.

WHY THIS ROLE MATTERS

We’re hiring a Business Recruiter to help us scale the next generation of talent across sales, customer success, and operations. You’ll be the engine behind our growth — identifying, engaging, and closing top performers who thrive in high-velocity, builder environments.

You’ll own high-volume recruiting across critical GTM and business functions, partner directly with leadership on hiring strategy, and play a key role in shaping the future culture of RepRally as we scale from early traction to industry dominance.




WHAT YOU’LL DO

 - Lead full-cycle recruiting across sales, success, and operations — from sourcing and outreach to offer and close.

 - Partner closely with hiring managers and founders to deeply understand role needs, team structure, and success profiles.

 - Build and manage robust candidate pipelines, ensuring smooth and high-touch experiences.

 - Develop creative sourcing strategies across LinkedIn, referrals, outbound, and community channels.

 - Track funnel performance, hiring velocity, and candidate quality metrics to continuously optimize.

 - Represent RepRally’s brand in a competitive market — you’ll be one of the first people candidates meet.

 - Contribute to broader hiring process improvements, tooling, and operational excellence.




WHAT WE’RE LOOKING FOR

 - 4+ years of recruiting experience, ideally starting in an agency environment before moving in-house.

 - At least 1+ year of experience at a high-growth startup.

 - Demonstrated success managing high-volume business recruiting (sales, customer success, operations).

 - Strong communication and relationship-building skills — you can engage everyone from SDRs to senior execs.

 - Self-starter who thrives in fast-paced, ambiguous environments.

 - Highly organized with a focus on execution, follow-through, and quality.

 - Passionate about building — you see recruiting as core to company creation, not just filling seats.

source_jobs.title: Independent Territory Sales Representative – Nationwide (US)
source_jobs.description:
What is RepRally?

RepRally is an AI-powered online marketplace that connects independent retailers directly with thousands of popular Consumer Packaged Goods (CPG) brands. Normally, these stores are forced to buy from giant middleman distributors who charge high prices. We fix that by combining our digital platform with the unstoppable power of real, face-to-face relationships. While we have an online platform, our field sales representatives are the true face and heartbeat of our business. Tech alone cannot replace a handshake, so we provide the inventory and data tools while our independent partners build the local trust needed to grow the network.

About the Opportunity

We are looking for motivated, hard-working independent sales partners to take over and grow their own local sales area in your local market. This is a 1099 independent contractor role where you bring the energy to talk to independent stores and close the sales, backed by our easy-to-use phone app, field support, and catalog of thousands of top-selling items.

Your Daily Work Involves:

You will be visiting independent retailers in your area—convenience stores, gas stations, bodegas, liquor stores, smoke shops, and any independent business that sells CPG goods (snacks, drinks, etc.). If it's independently owned and you can get in touch with the decision-maker, you can sell to them. We do not sell to large corporate chains (e.g., Walmart, Target).

Your typical work involves:

 - Walking In & Pitching: Walking into stores cold, getting past the counter, and pitching RepRally directly to the decision-maker.

 - Building Relationships: Hitting the phones and dropping by in person to scout out new stores, earn the owner's trust, and set appointments.

 - Placing Orders & Driving Volume: Using our mobile app right in the aisle to lock in the first sale, then actively managing the account to secure continuous, high-volume re-orders.

What We Look For

 - Sales or Hustle Experience: Experience in delivery routes, door-to-door sales, or retail is great—but a refusal to give up is what actually matters.

 - Comfort with Cold Pitching: You do not take "no" personally. You are comfortable walking into a store cold and following up until you get the win.

 - Independent Work Style: You love the freedom of running your own day without a manager watching over your shoulder.

 - The Basics: You need a valid driver's license, a reliable vehicle to get around, and a smartphone with a data plan.

Uncapped Earning Potential

Our payout plan features weekly bonuses and unlimited commissions to reward fast work. Earnings are processed every single week.

 - Territory Expansion Bonus: Earn an extra weekly cash bonus when you hit your milestones for setting up and activating new stores.

 - Performance Milestone Bonus: Earn an extra weekly cash bonus for hitting your total weekly sales volume goals.

 - Unlimited Commissions: Earn a percentage on every single dollar you bring in above your weekly baseline goal—with absolutely no limits on what you can make.

 - Multi-Brand Incentives: Earn an extra cash bonus on your weekly payout cycle every time a store places an order that stacks multiple different brands into one ticket.

Our Fast-Track Sign-Up Process (3 to 7 Days)

We respect your time. We do not do corporate ghosting or make you wait weeks for an answer. We review applications fast so you can get on the road and start making money immediately.

 1. Apply & Check Your Texts: Within minutes of applying, you will get a text message with a link to your structured video interview.

 2. Interview on Your Own Time: Skip the hassle of scheduling a live meeting. Record a quick, 15-minute video interview answering a few questions on your smartphone or your laptop computer whenever you are ready.

 3. Real Help via Text: If you get stuck or have questions, just reply directly to our text message. We have real people standing by to text you back.

 4. Fast Final Decision: We review su

RepRally is an AI-powered online marketplace that connects independent retailers directly with thousands of popular Consumer Packaged Goods (CPG) brands. Normally, these stores are forced to buy from giant middleman distributors who charge high prices. We fix that by combining our digital platform with the unstoppable power of real, face-to-face relationships. While we have an online platform, our field sales representatives are the true face and heartbeat of our business. Tech alone cannot replace a handshake, so we provide the inventory and data tools while our independent partners build the local trust needed to grow the network.

About the Opportunity

We are looking for motivated, hard-working independent sales partners to take over and grow their own local sales area in the Sacramento Metro Area. This is a 1099 independent contractor role where you bring the energy to talk to independent stores and close the sales, backed by our easy-to-use phone app, field support, and catalog of thousands of top-selling items.

Your Daily Work Involves:

You will be visiting independent retailers in your area—convenience stores, gas stations, bodegas, liquor stores, smoke shops, and any independent business that sells CPG goods (snacks, drinks, etc.). If it's independently owned and you can get in touch with the decision-maker, you can sell to them. We do not sell to large corporate chains (e.g., Walmart, Target).

Your typical work involves:

 - Walking In & Pitching: Walking into stores cold, getting past the counter, and pitching RepRally directly to the decision-maker.

 - Building Relationships: Hitting the phones and dropping by in person to scout out new stores, earn the owner's trust, and set appointments.

 - Placing Orders & Driving Volume: Using our mobile app right in the aisle to lock in the first sale, then actively managing the account to secure continuous, high-volume re-orders.

What We Look For

 - Sales or Hustle Experience: Experience in delivery routes, door-to-door sales, or retail is great—but a refusal to give up is what actually matters.

 - Comfort with Cold Pitching: You do not take "no" personally. You are comfortable walking into a store cold and following up until you get the win.

 - Independent Work Style: You love the freedom of running your own day without a manager watching over your shoulder.

 - The Basics: You need a valid driver's license, a reliable vehicle to get around, and a smartphone with a data plan.

Uncapped Earning Potential

Our payout plan features weekly bonuses and unlimited commissions to reward fast work. Earnings are processed every single week.

 - Territory Expansion Bonus: Earn an extra weekly cash bonus when you hit your milestones for setting up and activating new stores.

 - Performance Milestone Bonus: Earn an extra weekly cash bonus for hitting your total weekly sales volume goals.

 - Unlimited Commissions: Earn a percentage on every single dollar you bring in above your weekly baseline goal—with absolutely no limits on what you can make.

 - Multi-Brand Incentives: Earn an extra cash bonus on your weekly payout cycle every time a store places an order that stacks multiple different brands into one ticket.

Our Fast-Track Sign-Up Process (3 to 7 Days)

We respect your time. We do not do corporate ghosting or make you wait weeks for an answer. We review applications fast so you can get on the road and start making money immediately.

 1. Apply & Check Your Texts: Within minutes of applying, you will get a text message with a link to your structured video interview.

 2. Interview on Your Own Time: Skip the hassle of scheduling a live meeting. Record a quick, 15-minute video interview answering a few questions on your smartphone or your laptop computer whenever you are ready.

 3. Real Help via Text: If you get stuck or have questions, just reply directly to our text message. We have real people standing by to text you back.

 4. Fast Final Decision: We r

Join RepRally as a Commission Sales Representative. Sell to independent retail stores on your own schedule with uncapped earning potential. No interviews required — complete self-service onboarding and start selling immediately.

What You'll Do

Sell RepRally's catalogue to independent retail stores in your area. Use the RepRally app to place orders and manage your accounts. Work on your own schedule with no quotas or minimum hours.

What You Bring

Valid driver's license and reliable vehicle. Smartphone with a data plan. Self-motivated and comfortable working independently.

Why RepRally

7% commission on every single sale— you eat what you kill. No floor, no ceiling. Start immediately with self-service onboarding. Work when you want, where you want. Prove yourself and you'll be able to move on to a different level and unlock additional lucrative incentives!

source_jobs.title: Outside Sales Representative - (CPG & Beverage DSD/Distribution)
source_jobs.description:
About RepRally
RepRally is a fast-growing B2B tech marketplace helping emerging consumer brands expand into independent retail stores nationwide. We connect viral brands with independent retailers through a modern, app-based wholesale platform designed to simplify growth and drop-ship fulfillment for both brands and store owners.

About The Role

We are looking for an elite sales professional is located and already has deep relationships in the local independent retail space in the Atlanta metro area.

This is a full-cycle, true "hunter" opportunity where you will build and own your territory. You will be out in the field driving 4 to 5 days a week, focusing on opening new independent retail doors and driving continuous re-orders to build a massive, compounding book of business.

Who We Sell To

Basically, if a business is independently owned and Consumer Packaged Goods (CPG) , we want to work with them. Examples of independent stores we work with include:

Convenience stores , Grocery Stores, Mom-and-pop shops, Gas stations (Independent & Franchise Locations), Liquor stores, and Smoke shops.
Note: (While you can sell into liquor and smoke shops, our catalog does not include alcohol or tobacco).

Our reps even close deals with independently owned cafes, gyms, arcades, and bowling alleys. As long as you can get in front of the actual decision-maker, we can work with them.

We do not work with corporate-owned or massive chains like Walmart or Target with formal corporate processes.

What You’ll Do Every Day

 - Hit the Streets: Spend 4-5 days a week in the field, conducting 10-15 in-person cold visits daily to aggressively acquire new independent retail accounts.
   

 - Prospect & Pitch: Call ahead to set up appointments, get past the counter to speak directly with decision-makers, and pitch the RepRally catalog.
   

 - Use the Tech: Keep track of your leads in our system, and place store orders directly through the RepRally mobile app or get stores set up on our Online portal.
   

 - Drive Residual Volume: Secure the initial sale and actively manage the relationship to drive continuous, high-volume re-orders from your accounts.
   

Qualifications We're Looking For

 - Relevant CPG/DSD Experience: 2+ years of field sales, route sales, or territory development experience working for a CPG brand, snack distributor, non-alcoholic beverage company, or retail association. (No pure alcohol/tobacco distributor backgrounds).
   

 - An Existing Book Of Business : You must have an existing, active network of independent store owners and retail decision-makers in the Atlanta Metro Area. (Not corporate buyers at large, national chains).
   

 - Comfortable with Tech: We are a modern, paperless company. You don't need to be a computer wizard, but you do need to be comfortable using a smartphone, open to learning our mobile ordering app, and willing to track your leads in a basic CRM.
   

 - The Elite Hunter Mindset: You are a self-motivated "hunter" who thrives at selling in the field, not behind a desk.
   

 - The Basics: Valid driver’s license, reliable transportation, and a smartphone with an active data plan.
   

Why Join RepRally?

 - Uncapped earning potential with competitive base salary plus commission.

 - On-target earnings of $85K-$110K+.

 - Work directly with the HQ & Leadership Team in NYC.

 - Opportunity to build and grow an emerging market

 - High visibility within a rapidly scaling company

 - Benefits: Medical, Dental, Vision, 401(k)

source_jobs.title: District Sales Manager - New Business
source_jobs.description:
Job Description

Most DSD sales reps are really account managers. You spend your days maintaining routes, stocking shelves, rotating product, and servicing accounts you didn't open. RepRally is different. As a District Sales Manager, your only job is to open new doors.

RepRally is a fast-growing B2B marketplace transforming how brands reach independent retail. We connect emerging consumer brands with independent convenience stores, bodegas, and gas stations across the country — and we're expanding into Dallas now.

What You'll Do

Identify and sign new independent retail stores onto the RepRally platform across your assigned territory. Reactivate churned or inactive store accounts. Conduct in-person store visits to pitch owners on RepRally's catalogue and value proposition. Collaborate with field leadership on territory strategy. Hand off activated accounts to our field sales team for ongoing account management — your job ends at the open, theirs begins.

What You Bring

2+ years in DSD, route sales, or field sales — PepsiCo, Frito-Lay, Coca-Cola, McLane, Core-Mark, or similar strongly preferred. Familiarity with independent c-store, bodega, or gas station buyers. You know the difference between a hunter and a farmer — and you're a hunter. Comfortable walking into independent retail cold and closing on the spot. Valid driver's license and reliable vehicle. Smartphone with a data plan.

Compensation

Competitive base salary plus uncapped commission. OTE $100,000–$150,000+ based on performance. Full benefits including medical, dental, vision, 401(k), and a tech stipend. We reward output, not tenure.

Why RepRally Over Big DSD

Your upside is uncapped — no bonus caps, no corporate payout ceilings. Pure new business only — no route maintenance, no merchandising, no stocking shelves. Your territory is yours to build — no inherited book, no legacy accounts to babysit, no corporate playbook. Weekly performance visibility, not annual review cycles. #zr

Our reps even close deals with independently owned cafes, gyms, arcades, and bowling alleys. As long as you can get in front of the actual decision-maker, we can work with them.

We do not work with corporate-owned or massive chains like Walmart or Target with formal corporate processes.

What You’ll Do Every Day

 - Hit the Streets: Spend 4-5 days a week in the field, conducting 10-15 in-person cold visits daily to aggressively acquire new independent retail accounts.

 - Prospect & Pitch: Call ahead to set up appointments, get past the counter to speak directly with decision-makers, and pitch the RepRally catalog.

 - Use the Tech: Keep track of your leads in our system, and place store orders directly through the RepRally mobile app or get Stores Set up on Our Online portal.

 - Drive Residual Volume: Secure the initial sale and actively manage the relationship to drive continuous, high-volume re-orders from your accounts.

Qualifications We're Looking For

 - Relevant CPG/DSD Experience: 2+ years of field sales, route sales, or territory development experience working for a CPG brand, snack distributor, non-alcoholic beverage company, or retail association. (No pure alcohol/tobacco distributor backgrounds).

 - An Existing Book Of Business : You must have an existing, active network of independent store owners and retail decision-makers in the Newark/Jersey City Area. (Not corporate buyers at large, national chains).

 - Comfortable with Tech: We are a modern, paperless company. You don't need to be a computer wizard, but you do need to be comfortable using a smartphone, open to learning our mobile ordering app, and willing to track your leads in a basic CRM.

 - The Elite Hunter Mindset: You are a self-motivated "hunter" who thrives at selling in the field, not behind a desk.

 - The Basics: Valid driver’s license, reliable transportation, and a smartphone with an active data plan.

Why Join RepRally?

 - Uncapped earning potential with competitive base salary plus commission.

 - On-target earnings of $85K-$110K+.

 - Work directly with the HQ & Leadership Team in NYC.

 - Opportunity to build and grow an emerging market

 - High visibility within a rapidly scaling company

 - Benefits: Medical, Dental, Vision, 401(k) #zr

source_jobs.title: Independent Territory Sales Representative – New Haven, CT
source_jobs.description:
What is RepRally?

RepRally is an AI-powered online marketplace that connects independent retailers directly with thousands of popular Consumer Packaged Goods (CPG) brands. Normally, these stores are forced to buy from giant middleman distributors who charge high prices. We fix that by combining our digital platform with the unstoppable power of real, face-to-face relationships. While we have an online platform, our field sales representatives are the true face and heartbeat of our business. Tech alone cannot replace a handshake, so we provide the inventory and data tools while our independent partners build the local trust needed to grow the network.

About the Opportunity

We are looking for motivated, hard-working independent sales partners to take over and grow their own local sales area in the New Haven Metro Area. This is a 1099 independent contractor role where you bring the energy to talk to independent stores and close the sales, backed by our easy-to-use phone app, field support, and catalog of thousands of top-selling items.

Your Daily Work Involves:

You will be visiting independent retailers in your area—convenience stores, gas stations, bodegas, liquor stores, smoke shops, and any independent business that sells CPG goods (snacks, drinks, etc.). If it's independently owned and you can get in touch with the decision-maker, you can sell to them. We do not sell to large corporate chains (e.g., Walmart, Target).

Your typical work involves:

 - Walking In & Pitching: Walking into stores cold, getting past the counter, and pitching RepRally directly to the decision-maker.

 - Building Relationships: Hitting the phones and dropping by in person to scout out new stores, earn the owner's trust, and set appointments.

 - Placing Orders & Driving Volume: Using our mobile app right in the aisle to lock in the first sale, then actively managing the account to secure continuous, high-volume re-orders.

What We Look For

 - Sales or Hustle Experience: Experience in delivery routes, door-to-door sales, or retail is great—but a refusal to give up is what actually matters.

 - Comfort with Cold Pitching: You do not take "no" personally. You are comfortable walking into a store cold and following up until you get the win.

 - Independent Work Style: You love the freedom of running your own day without a manager watching over your shoulder.

 - The Basics: You need a valid driver's license, a reliable vehicle to get around, and a smartphone with a data plan.

Uncapped Earning Potential

Our payout plan features weekly bonuses and unlimited commissions to reward fast work. Earnings are processed every single week.

 - Territory Expansion Bonus: Earn an extra weekly cash bonus when you hit your milestones for setting up and activating new stores.

 - Performance Milestone Bonus: Earn an extra weekly cash bonus for hitting your total weekly sales volume goals.

 - Unlimited Commissions: Earn a percentage on every single dollar you bring in above your weekly baseline goal—with absolutely no limits on what you can make.

 - Multi-Brand Incentives: Earn an extra cash bonus on your weekly payout cycle every time a store places an order that stacks multiple different brands into one ticket.

Our Fast-Track Sign-Up Process (3 to 7 Days)

We respect your time. We do not do corporate ghosting or make you wait weeks for an answer. We review applications fast so you can get on the road and start making money immediately.

 1. Apply & Check Your Texts: Within minutes of applying, you will get a text message with a link to your structured video interview.

 2. Interview on Your Own Time: Skip the hassle of scheduling a live meeting. Record a quick, 15-minute video interview answering a few questions on your smartphone or your laptop computer whenever you are ready.

 3. Real Help via Text: If you get stuck or have questions, just reply directly to our text message. We have real people standing by to text you back.
